title: rosa rubella var. mediterranea
intro: Rosa rubella var. mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean red rose, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Rosa rubella var. mediterranea include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Rosa rubella var. mediterranea include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain types of cancer, as well as improving cognitive function and immune system. The herbal preparations of Rosa rubella var. mediterranea include teas, infusions, and jams, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
